data.content:
The formula in the image can be written in LaTeX as follows:

```latex
\text{RNN}: h_{t}^{l-1}, h_{t-1}^l \rightarrow h_t^l
```

This will render the equation as shown in the image.
data.latex:
The formula in the image can be written in LaTeX as follows:

```latex
\text{RNN}: h_{t}^{l-1}, h_{t-1}^l \rightarrow h_t^l
```

This will render the equation as shown in the image.

data.content:
```latex
\begin{align*}
\begin{pmatrix}
i \\
f \\
o \\
g
\end{pmatrix} &= 
\begin{pmatrix}
\text{sigm} \\
\text{sigm} \\
\text{sigm} \\
\tanh
\end{pmatrix}
T_{2n,4n}\left(\mathbf{D}(h_t^{l-1})\right) \\
c_t^l &= f \odot c_{t-1}^l + i \odot g \\
h_t^l &= o \odot \tanh(c_t^l)
\end{align*}
```
data.latex:
```latex
\begin{align*}
\begin{pmatrix}
i \\
f \\
o \\
g
\end{pmatrix} &= 
\begin{pmatrix}
\text{sigm} \\
\text{sigm} \\
\text{sigm} \\
\tanh
\end{pmatrix}
T_{2n,4n}\left(\mathbf{D}(h_t^{l-1})\right) \\
c_t^l &= f \odot c_{t-1}^l + i \odot g \\
h_t^l &= o \odot \tanh(c_t^l)
\end{align*}
```
